name: sshfs
description: Use configured OpenSSH hosts through the built-in file tools.

interface.shortDescription: Access configured OpenSSH hosts with built-in file tools.
interface.longDescription: Use paths such as ssh/judy:/etc/hosts or ssh/ileqm:project/file with unified exec and apply_patch. Remote hosts are mounted on demand through sshfs.
defaultPrompt: Read or edit a file on one of my configured SSH hosts.
